title: Monitor the effective operations of electrical stimulation
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor the effective operations of electrical stimulation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor electrical stimulation unit

pcs.text: Monitor the electrical stimulation unit using the correct procedure to check electrical stimulation equipment operation1.2 Use dummy load across each of the electrical inputs to check operation in accordance with work instructions and manufacturers’ specifications1.3 Observe for and describe the normal reaction of carcases to electrical stimulation1.4 Observe for and respond to any abnormal reaction of carcases to electrical stimulation1.5 Follow up on requests for maintenance and check operation is normal1.6 Follow workplace health and safety requirements for working around electrical stimulation units
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor the electrical stimulation unit using the correct procedure to check electrical stimulation equipment operation1.2 Use dummy load across each of the electrical inputs to check operation in accordance with work instructions and manufacturers’ specifications1.3 Observe for and describe the normal reaction of carcases to electrical stimulation1.4 Observe for and respond to any abnormal reaction of carcases to electrical stimulation1.5 Follow up on requests for maintenance and check operation is normal1.6 Follow workplace health and safety requirements for working around electrical stimulation units?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor the electrical stimulation unit using the correct procedure to check electrical stimulation equipment operation1.2 Use dummy load across each of the electrical inputs to check operation in accordance with work instructions and manufacturers’ specifications1.3 Observe for and describe the normal reaction of carcases to electrical stimulation1.4 Observe for and respond to any abnormal reaction of carcases to electrical stimulation1.5 Follow up on requests for maintenance and check operation is normal1.6 Follow workplace health and safety requirements for working around electrical stimulation units.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor electrical stimulation unit

elements.title: Ensure routine checks of equipment by technicians are performed

pcs.text: Arrange or oversee routine checks to ensure a full check of the equipment is made including: electrical parameters, stored programs, electrical safety, electrodes and equipment integration2.2 Review maintenance and equipment reports detailing the findings and recommendations and implement corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange or oversee routine checks to ensure a full check of the equipment is made including: electrical parameters, stored programs, electrical safety, electrodes and equipment integration2.2 Review maintenance and equipment reports detailing the findings and recommendations and implement corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange or oversee routine checks to ensure a full check of the equipment is made including: electrical parameters, stored programs, electrical safety, electrodes and equipment integration2.2 Review maintenance and equipment reports detailing the findings and recommendations and implement corrective actions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Ensure routine checks of equipment by technicians are performed

elements.title: Respond to audits of carcase specification compliance

pcs.text: Describe the pH/temperature window and its importance to meat quality3.2 Describe the audit process for electrical stimulation unit performance and the various potential findings3.3 Respond to adverse audit findings including recommendations to alter stimulation inputs, alter stimulation time and adjust chilling regime
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe the pH/temperature window and its importance to meat quality3.2 Describe the audit process for electrical stimulation unit performance and the various potential findings3.3 Respond to adverse audit findings including recommendations to alter stimulation inputs, alter stimulation time and adjust chilling regime?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe the pH/temperature window and its importance to meat quality3.2 Describe the audit process for electrical stimulation unit performance and the various potential findings3.3 Respond to adverse audit findings including recommendations to alter stimulation inputs, alter stimulation time and adjust chilling regime.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Respond to audits of carcase specification compliance
